name: Ubiquiti 10Gbps Single-Mode Optical Module, 2-pack
title: Ubiquiti 10Gbps Single-Mode Optical Module, 2-pack
short_description: U Fiber, Single-mode, duplex, fiber transceiver module, 10Gbps, 2-Pack
description: U Fiber, Single-mode, duplex, fiber transceiver module, 10Gbps, 2-Pack

detailed_description.text: The 10 Gbps Single-Mode Optical Module, model UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-2, manufactured by Ubiquiti, is an advanced optical transceiver designed for high-speed data transmission over single-mode fiber (SMF) optic cables. This module is engineered to support data rates of up to 10 gigabits per second (Gbps), offering exceptional performance and reliability for long-distance network applications.

- 10 Gbps throughput
- Duplex LC connector
- Supports connections up to 10 km*

The UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-2 utilizes single-mode fiber technology, which is optimized for long-distance data transmissions commonly found in wide-area networks (WANs), metropolitan area networks (MANs), and telecommunications networks. With a typical transmission distance of up to 10 kilometers, this module provides reliable and high-bandwidth connectivity over extended distances without compromising on performance.

Featuring a duplex LC connector, the UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-2 ensures a secure and reliable connection to SMF optic cables, maintaining signal integrity and minimizing the risk of data loss or transmission errors. The use of duplex LC connectors also facilitates easy and straightforward installation, allowing for quick deployment and connectivity within network infrastructures.

This optical module operates within the standard optical wavelength window of 1310 nanometers (nm), which is commonly used for single-mode fiber transmissions. This wavelength ensures compatibility with existing SMF optic cables and networking equipment, enabling seamless integration into new or existing network deployments without the need for extensive reconfiguration.

The UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-2 complies with industry standards, ensuring interoperability with a wide range of networking devices and equipment. This standardization enhances flexibility and compatibility, enabling the module to be deployed in diverse network environments without compatibility issues.

One notable feature of the UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-2 is its support for Digital Diagnostics Monitoring (DDM). This feature enables real-time monitoring of critical parameters such as temperature, optical power output, optical power received, and laser bias current. DDM provides valuable insights into the operational status of the module, allowing for proactive maintenance and troubleshooting to ensure optimal network performance and reliability.

The module's small form-factor pluggable (SFP+) design allows for easy installation and replacement, minimizing downtime and disruption to network operations. Its low power consumption helps to reduce operating costs and minimize heat generation, contributing to overall energy efficiency and environmental sustainability.
